# IMGD 5010 - Final Project

## Final Project Proposal:

For this project, I'm interested in doing a live-coding performance that combines visuals and audio, similar to my shader assignment, but with the audio being generated programmatically as well this time instead of using a pre-made track. There are a few things I want to keep from that assignment, namely having components of the visuals that react to different parts of the track, but I do want the visuals to be much more involved and complex than just the sinewaves I was working with before.

I plan to do my live-coding in Strudel, using its support for Hydra for the visuals; I will have to learn how to work in both of these environments, which may create an extra bit of difficulty, but I'd enjoy getting to mess around with a new set of programs. 

Ideally, the final result will be an approximately 3:00 performance, likely recorded instead of actually performed live for this class (though that may be a stretch goal of mine if I get comfortable enough with the systems).<br><br>
